series_metadata.series_title: Confidential Personal Information (CPI) System Access Logs
series_metadata.series_description: The Confidential Personal (CPI) System Access Logs keeps track of who has accessed confidential personal information (CPI) pursuant to ORC 1347.15 Access rules for confidential personal information.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: CPI System Access Logs a rolling () basis. When a record reaches 61st month from time it was entered into log, delete it from log file
